---
title: "Skrub Tutorial Slides"
format: html
---

## Introduction
- [Chapter 0: Introduction](chapters/00_intro.slides.html)

## Exploring and sanitizing data
- [Chapter 1: Exploring Data](chapters/01_exploring_data.slides.html)
- [Chapter 2: Cleaning Data](chapters/02_cleaning_data.slides.html)
- [Quiz 01](../book/chapters/quiz_01.html)
- Exercise 1

## Transforming columns
- [Chapter 3: Apply Transformations](chapters/03_feat_eng_apply.slides.html)
- [Chapter 4: Selectors](chapters/04_selectors.slides.html)
- [Quiz 02](../book/chapters/quiz_02.html)
- Exercise 2

## Building a strong baseline
- [Chapter 5: Table Vectorization](chapters/05_table_vectorizer.slides.html)
- [Chapter 6: Tabular Pipelines](chapters/06_tabular_pipeline.slides.html)
- [Quiz 03](../book/chapters/quiz_03.html)
- Exercise 3


## Feature Engineering with skrub
- [Chapter 7: Numerical Features](chapters/07_feat_eng_numerical.slides.html)
- [Chapter 8: Datetime Features](chapters/08_feat_eng_datetimes.slides.html)
- [Chapter 9: Categorical Features](chapters/09_feat_eng_categorical.slides.html)
- [Quiz 04](../book/chapters/quiz_04.html)


## Data Ops
- [Chapter 10: Data Ops](chapters/10_data_ops.slides.html)
